title: Luxury stocks spike on proposed U.S.-Iran peace deal; LVMH up 5%
summary_full: Luxury stocks have been hard hit by the Iran war, as the Middle East had been a fast-growing market for the otherwise largely muted sector.
summary_public: Luxury stocks have been hard hit by the Iran war, as the Middle East had been a fast-growing market for the otherwise largely muted sector.

IR.label: neutral
IR.evidence: Luxury stocks spike on proposed U.S.-Iran peace deal
